headline: Nothing CEO says phone prices are going to keep going up
summary: Nothing CEO Carl Pei warns that smartphone prices will continue to rise. A RAM shortage has already impacted Nothing's mid-range Phone 4A. Pei suggests 'yesterday' was the best time to upgrade your phone.

headline: The world’s first trillionaire is a killer
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO is set to make him the world's first trillionaire. The article highlights Musk's controversial personal conduct. It alleges his actions directly caused hundreds of thousands of deaths a year ago.

headline: Siri is good now??
summary: After a decade of mixed reviews, Apple's Siri has reportedly improved significantly. A new version of Siri shows surprising competence and usefulness. Users might finally find Siri capable of more than basic tasks.

headline: A trillion dollars is a stupid amount of money
summary: Elon Musk has become the world's first trillionaire. The article emphasizes the colossal scale of a trillion dollars in wealth and power. It highlights the difficulty for most people to comprehend such immense riches.

headline: Save 40% Off a Popular Magnetic Rower Exercise Machine, Now Under $150 Ahead of Father's Day
summary: Get 40% off a popular magnetic rower, now priced under $150. The machine offers cardiovascular and full-body resistance training. This deal is available just in time for Father's Day.

headline: Expand Your Home Gym With This Adjustable Weight Bench for Just $38 Shipped on Amazon
summary: An adjustable weight bench is available for only $38, including shipping on Amazon. It's described as a perfect complement for existing dumbbells. This is a budget-friendly option to enhance your home gym.

headline: The Powerful Yet Compact JUFINX Cordless Electric Air Duster Drops to $19.99 Ahead of Father's Day
summary: The JUFINX Cordless Electric Air Duster is on sale for $19.99. This compact duster offers a reusable alternative to compressed air cans. Grab this deal before Father's Day for easy electronics cleaning.

headline: The Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart Booster Box Drops to a New Low Price
summary: The Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart Booster Box is now at its lowest price ever. Fans of both Magic: The Gathering and Marvel can find a great deal. This is an opportunity to expand your collection at a reduced cost.

headline: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
summary: Elon Musk is now officially the world's first trillionaire. His net worth is reported at $1.11 trillion following SpaceX's IPO. SpaceX debuted on Nasdaq with a valuation of $2.2 trillion.

headline: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
summary: Iran, the US, and mediators Pakistan are nearing a deal to end hostilities. The agreement would facilitate the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. Negotiations are reportedly close to finalization.

headline: Rugby star Sinfield and authors Blackman and Donaldson lead honours list
summary: Rugby legend Kevin Sinfield has been knighted in the latest honours list. Authors Malorie Blackman and Julia Donaldson have both been made dames. The list celebrates prominent figures in sports and literature.

headline: I have a duty to stay on, says Starmer, as he justifies defence spending decisions
summary: Sir Keir Starmer states he has a duty to remain in his position. He defends his 'hard-edged' decisions regarding defence spending. This comes after his defence secretary resigned over a financial dispute.
